nasb.text: I said to them, ‘Whoever has any gold, let them tear it off.’ So they gave it to me, and I threw it into the fire, and out came this calf.”

esv.text: So I said to them, ‘Let any who have gold take it off.’ So they gave it to me, and I threw it into the fire, and out came this calf.”

cnv.text: 我對他們說：‘凡是有金子的，都可以摘下來’，他們就給了我；我把它丟在火裡，這牛犢就出來了。”

ccb.text: 于是，我吩咐他们摘下金耳环给我，我把这些金耳环丢进火里，这头牛犊就出来了。”
